brand.name: i-Beaute Skin + Body
brand.location: The Gallery, Suite 16, 445 Victoria Ave, Chatswood NSW 2067

one_liner: Non-invasive ultrasound lifting that visibly tightens skin in a single session — with zero downtime.
target_audience: Women 35+ in Sydney noticing early laxity on the jawline, brows and neck who want a natural lift without surgery or downtime.
main_problem: Creams and facials stop working once skin laxity sets in, but a surgical facelift feels too drastic and the downtime is impossible to fit around work and family.
key_benefit: Targeted ultrasound rebuilds collagen deep in the dermis for a natural lift; results keep improving over ~3 months and you walk out the same day.

pricing.note: Treatment pricing is tailored to the areas treated and confirmed at consultation. Consultation is complimentary.

testimonials.quote: Feel so pampered after the treatment. Portia and her staff are very professional and friendly.
testimonials.name: Maria W.

testimonials.quote: My skin was blocked, clogged and breaking out. The team analysed my needs…
testimonials.name: Kelly B.

testimonials.quote: Extremely friendly staff. Highly recommend — will be going back. Amazing!
testimonials.name: Ayva

testimonials_note: Real, public reviews from i-Beaute's Fresha/Bookwell profiles. Clinic-wide (not Sofwave-specific). Do NOT fabricate Sofwave-specific reviews.

authority.bio: i-Beaute Skin + Body in Chatswood delivers advanced treatments through trained skin therapists who treat the face as a whole — never a single sale. Every Sofwave plan starts with a proper consultation and an honest answer about suitability.
credentials: The Gallery, Suite 16 · 445 Victoria Ave, Chatswood

inclusions: Targeted Sofwave treatment (jaw, brow, neck or submental)

faq.a: A warming sensation with brief moments of heat; integrated cooling keeps the surface comfortable and the therapist adjusts to you.
Yes. Mild redness or slight puffiness at most; no marks to hide, most people return to their day immediately.
Some firmness in the first weeks; the real result builds as new collagen matures over ~3 months after a single session.
New-collagen results are long-lasting though skin keeps ageing; many choose a maintenance session later. Honest, personalised view at consult.

faq.q: Is it safe for my skin tone?
faq.a: Yes — Sofwave's ultrasound works independently of melanin, suitable for all skin tones, year-round.
With a complimentary consultation. We assess suitability and only recommend Sofwave if it's genuinely right for you. Book on Fresha.

yes: Noticing early to moderate laxity on the jaw, brow or neck
Want a natural lift, not a dramatic change
Can't fit surgical downtime around work and family
Would rather invest once than chase results with creams
no: Significant, advanced sagging better suited to surgery
Pregnant or certain medical conditions — advised honestly at consult

facts.tech: Sofwave™ delivers ultrasound energy to the mid-dermis with integrated surface cooling; TGA & FDA cleared; works on all skin tones; ~30 min; one session; collagen rebuilds over ~3 months.

brand_colors.note: i-Beaute brand is sage green + warm gold (see live site). Pipeline may confirm or refine.

vibe: editorial luxury (Aesop / La Mer), calm, premium, honest
photos_note: Real client photos available; will be copied into assets/ after render.
